description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.

items.name: Militech Sniper w/ NVS & Elepehant Rounds

description.value: A long-distance sniper rifle. Holds 4 bullets in a magazine.
Reduces penalties against targets in darkness, smoke/fog to 0.
Elephant rounds are rifle rounds which may only be loaded into a sniper rifle which explode on impact, functioning as armor-piercing rounds which deal an additional 3 damage.
Briefcase used for hooking up a wounded person. Places them in stasis.

Injecting a target with Speedheal immediately causes them to heal HP equal to their BODY plus their WILL. This effect does not work on Mortally Wounded targets, and can only be used on a target once per day.

A Militech issued crystal monoblade, honed to manufactured perfection.

+1 to Attack.

Interfacing with the Specialist’s specially-designed bodysuit, the active cloaking device camouflages its user for a short period of time after being activated as an action. They gain +4 to stealth checks, and attacks or checks to see them are made with a cumulative -4 penalty.
Deals no Damage. Fills a 10m/yd x 10m/yd with smoke for 1 minute. Tasks obscured by smoke have a -4 penalty.

A basic lob or pitch of an object. Use an Action to make a Ranged Attack at up to 25m/yds. Targets can choose to Dodge your throw if they can Dodge bullets. Melee weapons deal their base damage, but don't penetrate half SP.
Anytime the stun baton deals damage, target must make an Endurance check: DV = 10+dmg. On failure, the target is stunned for their next turn.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-1 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are removed by a BODY stat of 7 or higher (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab)..

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-1 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are removed by a BODY stat of 7 or higher (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab)..

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 5/Org Boss - High-level named threats who hold significant hard power, in charge of leading the various orgs found around NC.

Corp-Wide Ability - Advanced Tactics: Once per round after a Militech goon has taken an action, select another goon of the same type; they may immediately take the same action, if eligible to do so.

Ability - Battlefield Controller: For each strike commander on the field, you may utilize the Advanced Tactics ability an additional time each round.

Ability - Netlinked Ninja: Strike Commanders can use their Physical skill to dodge bullets. Additionally, they are equipped with a cyberdeck and plugs - upon jacking into an unprotected net infrastructure, they can disable it the turn after jacking in while remaining plugged, take control of it the turn after that, and gain root access (permanently disable, turn off and unlink, scramble IFF, etc) after three.

Extra Gear - Choose one of the following:

  • Sniper Pack: A sniper rifle with an infrared night vision scope and Militech proprietary Elephant Rounds.

    • Elephant rounds are rifle rounds which may only be loaded into a sniper rifle which explode on impact, functioning as armor-piercing rounds which deal an additional 3 damage.

  • Medic Pack: Two hits of speedheal, a cryopump, and the Electrical Dispairagement ability.

    • For goons administered speedheal, they heal for BODY + ½ their Lowdown skill, rounded up.

    • Ability - Electrical Disparagement: The commander uses an action to temporarily electrify their Militech ally or other infrastructure which has been designed to withstand the tech; the first time the target is touched, the individual touching them takes 2d6 damage directly to their HP. This effect fades after one minute.

  • CQB Pack: A +1 Katana, a smoke grenade, and an active cloaking device which lasts 30 seconds.

    • Interfacing with the commander's specially-designed armor, the active cloaking device camouflages its user for a short period of time after being activated as an action. They gain +4 to stealth checks, and attacks or checks to see them are made with a cumulative -4 penalty.

I poke fun at Militech’s recruitment, but there’s no arguing with its strike commanders. Every one of them has seen a tour in an active war zone, whether it’s battling raiders in the Badlands or skirmishing with Arasaka in the Pacific, and Militech makes sure that they stay that way.
